testcase.name: memberRepo_noTenantContext_filterNotApplied

testcase.name: memberGet_crossTenantAccess_returns404
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T10:18:39.074+07:00 WARN 67892 --- [spring-saas-support-ai] [o-auto-1-exec-5] c.l.s.common.GlobalExceptionHandler : app_exception errorCode=MEMBER_NOT_FOUND status=404 NOT_FOUND message=Member not found: id=898b050c-a1ad-445d-9d3c-6fbfb2c513f0
